Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Order Setting Aside Default And Judgment Of Steven Kariker Aka Steven D. Kariker
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MACHINES CORPORATION's Motion For Order Setting Aside Default And Judgment Of Steven Kariker Aka Steven D. Kariker.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment-Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by Vicki Gross, CSR#5525, vgross@sftc.org, 415-551-3730 (514)

Denis Klaudionos, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff International Business Machines Corporation A Corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Steven Kariker.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $46,652.58
Pre-Judgment Interest: $10,428.48
Attorney's Fees: $
Costs: $837.30
Total Judgment in the amount of $57,918.36
Judgment signed in open court.
